name: Bug Report (Terminal/UI)
about: Report a bug in the Kairos terminal — crashes, rendering, shell integration, keybindings, settings

labels: bug

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce
1.
2.
3.

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error output or log snippets.

## Environment
- **Kairos version:** (Help → About, or `kairos --version`)
- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15)
- **Shell:** (e.g., bash 5.2, zsh 5.9, PowerShell 7.6)
- **GPU/renderer:** (if rendering issue — OpenGL / Metal / DirectX)

## Logs
Kairos logs are written to:
- **macOS/Linux:** `~/.local/share/kairos/logs/`
- **Windows:** `%APPDATA%\kairos\logs\`

```
paste relevant log lines here
```

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or videos.

> **AI/Governance bug?** File it in [specsmith](https://github.com/BitConcepts/specsmith/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) instead.
